title: Maximum Number of Words Found in Sentences

testcases.input: sentences = ["alice and bob love leetcode", "i think so too", "this is great thanks very much"] Output: 6 Explanation: - The first sentence, "alice and bob love leetcode", has 5 words in total. - The second sentence, "i think so too", has 4 words in total. - The third sentence, "this is great thanks very much", has 6 words in total. Thus, the maximum number of words in a single sentence comes from the third sentence, which has 6 words.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: - The first sentence, "alice and bob love leetcode", has 5 words in total. - The second sentence, "i think so too", has 4 words in total. - The third sentence, "this is great thanks very much", has 6 words in total. Thus, the maximum number of words in a single sentence comes from the third sentence, which has 6 words.

testcases.input: sentences = ["please wait", "continue to fight", "continue to win"] Output: 3 Explanation: It is possible that multiple sentences contain the same number of words. In this example, the second and third sentences (underlined) have the same number of words.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: It is possible that multiple sentences contain the same number of words. In this example, the second and third sentences (underlined) have the same number of words.
